      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Reconstruct TCP flows keyed by 5-tuple; track bytes, RTT, concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _endpoint(ip: str, port: int) -> tuple[str, int]:\r\n    return (str(ip), int(port))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_key(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically for a unique flow key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _endpoint(src_ip, src_port)\r\n    b = _endpoint(dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    # Compare (ip, port) tuples: first by ip string, then by port int\r\n    if a[0] != b[0]:\r\n        return (a, b) if a[0] < b[0] else (b, a)\r\n    return (a, b) if a[1] <= b[1] else (b, a)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _FlowState:\r\n    \"\"\"Mutable state for one flow.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]\r\n    client_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    client_port: int = 0\r\n    server_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    server_port: int = 0\r\n    start_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    end_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    bytes_c2s: int = 0\r\n    bytes_s2c: int = 0\r\n    packets_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packets_s2c: int = 0\r\n    rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    syn_seen: bool = False\r\n    client_syn_ts: float | None = None  # ts of client's SYN for RTT\r\n    syn_ack_ts: float | None = None  # ts of server's SYN-ACK for RTT\r\n    initiator_seen: bool = False\r\n    segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]] = field(default_factory=list)  # ts, payload, \"c2s\"|\"s2c\", seq\r\n    last_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    fin_c2s: bool = False\r\n    fin_s2c: bool = False\r\n    rst: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def is_client_to_server(self, src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> bool:\r\n        return (src_ip, src_port) == (self.client_ip, self.client_port)\r\n\r\n    def add_packet(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        flags: int,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        TH_SYN = 0x02\r\n        TH_FIN = 0x01\r\n        TH_RST = 0x04\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n\r\n        # Determine direction: if we already know client, use it; else we'll set it below\r\n        if self.initiator_seen:\r\n            c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        else:\r\n            # First packet: SYN sender is client. Key is (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == self.key[0]:\r\n                c2s = True  # treat first endpoint as client until we see SYN from the other\r\n            else:\r\n                c2s = False\r\n\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.client_syn_ts = ts\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts\r\n        if payload or (flags & TH_SYN):\r\n            self.segments.append((ts, payload, direction, tcp_seq))\r\n        if flags & TH_FIN:\r\n            if c2s:\r\n                self.fin_c2s = True\r\n            else:\r\n                self.fin_s2c = True\r\n        if flags & TH_RST:\r\n            self.rst = True\r\n\r\n    def is_closed(self) -> bool:\r\n        return self.rst or (self.fin_c2s and self.fin_s2c)\r\n\r\n    def duration_sec(self) -> float:\r\n        return self.end_ts - self.start_ts if self.start_ts else 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_ip_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> str:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[0]\r\n    return a[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_port_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> int:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[1]\r\n    return a[1]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _client_syn_ts(segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp of first c2s segment (client SYN or first data). Used for RTT.\"\"\"\r\n    for ts, _payload, direction, _seq in segments:\r\n        if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n            return ts\r\n    return None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FlowTracker:\r\n    \"\"\"Tracks active flows; yields Flow and segments when a flow closes or times out.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        capture_file_id: str,\r\n        flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = 60.0,\r\n        concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = 1.0,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        self.capture_file_id = capture_file_id\r\n        self.flow_idle_timeout_sec = flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        self.concurrency_bucket_seconds = concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._flows: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], _FlowState] = {}\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets: defaultdict[float, set[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]]] = (\r\n            defaultdict(set)\r\n        )\r\n        self._current_ts: float = 0.0\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_flow(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]) -> _FlowState:\r\n        if key not in self._flows:\r\n            self._flows[key] = _FlowState(key=key)\r\n        return self._flows[key]\r\n\r\n    def _update_concurrency(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], ts: float) -> None:\r\n        bucket = (ts // self.concurrency_bucket_seconds) * self.concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets[bucket].add(key)\r\n\r\n    def _get_concurrency_timeline(self) -> list[tuple[float, int]]:\r\n        return [(t, len(s)) for t, s in sorted(self._concurrency_buckets.items())]\r\n\r\n    def _build_flow_model(\r\n        self,\r\n        state: _FlowState,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None,\r\n    ) -> Flow:\r\n        duration = state.duration_sec()\r\n        rtt_ms = None\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts is not None and state.client_syn_ts is not None:\r\n            rtt_ms = (state.syn_ack_ts - state.client_syn_ts) * 1000.0\r\n        return Flow(\r\n            flow_id=flow_id,\r\n            capture_file_id=self.capture_file_id,\r\n            src_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            src_port=state.client_port,\r\n            dst_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            dst_port=state.server_port,\r\n            protocol=6,\r\n            client_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            client_port=state.client_port,\r\n            server_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            server_port=state.server_port,\r\n            start_ts=state.start_ts,\r\n            end_ts=state.end_ts,\r\n            duration_sec=duration,\r\n            bytes_client_to_server=state.bytes_c2s,\r\n            bytes_server_to_client=state.bytes_s2c,\r\n            packet_count_c2s=state.packets_c2s,\r\n            packet_count_s2c=state.packets_s2c,\r\n            estimated_rtt_ms=rtt_ms,\r\n            concurrency_timeline=concurrency_timeline,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def ingest(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        protocol: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        tcp_flags: int,\r\n    ) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Process one packet. Yields (Flow, segments) for each flow that just closed.\"\"\"\r\n        self._current_ts = ts\r\n        key = _normalize_key(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n        state = self._ensure_flow(key)\r\n\r\n        state.add_packet(ts, src_ip, src_port, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n        self._update_concurrency(key, ts)\r\n\r\n        if state.is_closed():\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, protocol, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            timeline = self._get_concurrency_timeline()\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, timeline)\r\n            segments = state.segments\r\n            del self._flows[key]\r\n            yield (flow, segments)\r\n\r\n    def flush_idle(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Close flows that have been idle past flow_idle_timeout_sec. Yields (Flow, segments).\"\"\"\r\n        to_remove = [\r\n            k\r\n            for k, s in self._flows.items()\r\n            if self._current_ts - s.last_ts >= self.flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        ]\r\n        for key in to_remove:\r\n            state = self._flows.pop(key)\r\n            if not state.initiator_seen:\r\n                continue\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, 6, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, self._get_concurrency_timeline())\r\n            yield (flow, state.segments)\r\n            del state\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"TCP stream reassembly with out-of-order and retransmission handling; bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\n# TCP sequence numbers are 32-bit and wrap; we use unsigned 32-bit arithmetic\r\nSEQ_MASK = 0xFFFFFFFF\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_lt(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    \"\"\"True if a is strictly before b in sequence space (within 2^31 window).\"\"\"\r\n    if a == b:\r\n        return False\r\n    return (a - b) & SEQ_MASK < 0x80000000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_le(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    return a == b or _seq_lt(a, b)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _DirState:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassembly state for one direction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    next_seq: int | None = None  # next expected sequence number\r\n    emitted: bytearray = field(default_factory=bytearray)  # in-order bytes emitted so far\r\n    emitted_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]] = field(default_factory=list)  # (offset, ts) for first byte of segment\r\n    pending: list[tuple[int, bytes, float]] = field(default_factory=list)  # (seq, data, ts) not yet emitted\r\n    total_buffered: int = 0\r\n    max_bytes: int = 1 << 20  # 1 MB default\r\n    truncated: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def add_segment(self, seq: int, data: bytes, ts: float) -> None:\r\n        if self.truncated or not data:\r\n            return\r\n        if self.total_buffered + len(data) > self.max_bytes:\r\n            self.truncated = True\r\n            return\r\n        self.pending.append((seq, data, ts))\r\n        self.total_buffered += len(data)\r\n\r\n    def _ts_at_offset(self, offset: int) -> float | None:\r\n        \"\"\"Return approximate timestamp for byte at offset (from emitted_ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            return None\r\n        best_ts = None\r\n        for o, t in self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            if o <= offset:\r\n                best_ts = t\r\n        return best_ts\r\n\r\n    def get_reassembled(self) -> tuple[bytes, list[tuple[int, float]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Merge pending into emitted in order; return (full_bytes, ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.pending:\r\n            return (bytes(self.emitted), list(self.emitted_ts_map))\r\n        self.pending.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0] & SEQ_MASK, x[0]))\r\n        out = bytearray(self.emitted)\r\n        ts_map = list(self.emitted_ts_map)\r\n        next_seq = self.next_seq\r\n        if next_seq is None and self.pending:\r\n            next_seq = self.pending[0][0]\r\n        i = 0\r\n        while i < len(self.pending):\r\n            seq, data, _ts = self.pending[i]\r\n            if next_seq is None:\r\n                next_seq = seq\r\n            start_out_len = len(out)\r\n            # segment [seq, seq+len)\r\n            end_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            # Entire segment is before next_seq (duplicate/retrans) -> skip\r\n            if _seq_lt(end_seq, next_seq) or (end_seq == next_seq and _seq_lt(seq, next_seq)):\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            if _seq_lt(next_seq, seq):\r\n                # Gap: segment starts after next_seq\r\n                out.extend(data)\r\n                ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n                next_seq = end_seq\r\n                self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n                del self.pending[i]\r\n                continue\r\n            # Overlap: segment overlaps next_seq\r\n            offset = (next_seq - seq) & SEQ_MASK\r\n            if offset >= len(data):\r\n                # Segment entirely before next_seq (duplicate)\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            chunk = data[offset:]\r\n            out.extend(chunk)\r\n            ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n            next_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n            del self.pending[i]\r\n        self.emitted = out\r\n        self.next_seq = next_seq\r\n        self.emitted_ts_map = ts_map\r\n        return (bytes(out), ts_map)\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TCPReassembler:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassemble TCP streams per flow with bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(self, max_bytes_per_direction: int = 1 << 20) -> None:\r\n        self.max_bytes_per_direction = max_bytes_per_direction\r\n\r\n    def reassemble(\r\n        self,\r\n        segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]],\r\n    ) -> tuple[bytes, bytes, list[tuple[int, float]], list[tuple[int, float]], bool]:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Reassemble segments into client-to-server and server-to-client byte streams.\r\n        Returns (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated).\r\n        ts_map: list of (byte_offset, timestamp) for first byte of each segment.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        c2s = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        s2c = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        for ts, payload, direction, seq in segments:\r\n            if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n                c2s.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n            else:\r\n                s2c.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n        c2s_bytes, c2s_ts_map = c2s.get_reassembled()\r\n        s2c_bytes, s2c_ts_map = s2c.get_reassembled()\r\n        truncated = c2s.truncated or s2c.truncated\r\n        return (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated)\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(server_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4845634861506629183}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Reconstruct TCP flows keyed by 5-tuple; track bytes, RTT, concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _endpoint(ip: str, port: int) -> tuple[str, int]:\r\n    return (str(ip), int(port))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_key(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically for a unique flow key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _endpoint(src_ip, src_port)\r\n    b = _endpoint(dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    # Compare (ip, port) tuples: first by ip string, then by port int\r\n    if a[0] != b[0]:\r\n        return (a, b) if a[0] < b[0] else (b, a)\r\n    return (a, b) if a[1] <= b[1] else (b, a)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _FlowState:\r\n    \"\"\"Mutable state for one flow.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]\r\n    client_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    client_port: int = 0\r\n    server_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    server_port: int = 0\r\n    start_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    end_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    bytes_c2s: int = 0\r\n    bytes_s2c: int = 0\r\n    packets_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packets_s2c: int = 0\r\n    rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    syn_seen: bool = False\r\n    client_syn_ts: float | None = None  # ts of client's SYN for RTT\r\n    syn_ack_ts: float | None = None  # ts of server's SYN-ACK for RTT\r\n    initiator_seen: bool = False\r\n    segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]] = field(default_factory=list)  # ts, payload, \"c2s\"|\"s2c\", seq\r\n    last_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    fin_c2s: bool = False\r\n    fin_s2c: bool = False\r\n    rst: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def is_client_to_server(self, src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> bool:\r\n        return (src_ip, src_port) == (self.client_ip, self.client_port)\r\n\r\n    def add_packet(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        flags: int,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        TH_SYN = 0x02\r\n        TH_FIN = 0x01\r\n        TH_RST = 0x04\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n\r\n        # Determine direction: if we already know client, use it; else we'll set it below\r\n        if self.initiator_seen:\r\n            c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        else:\r\n            # First packet: SYN sender is client. Key is (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == self.key[0]:\r\n                c2s = True  # treat first endpoint as client until we see SYN from the other\r\n            else:\r\n                c2s = False\r\n\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.client_syn_ts = ts\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts\r\n        if payload or (flags & TH_SYN):\r\n            self.segments.append((ts, payload, direction, tcp_seq))\r\n        if flags & TH_FIN:\r\n            if c2s:\r\n                self.fin_c2s = True\r\n            else:\r\n                self.fin_s2c = True\r\n        if flags & TH_RST:\r\n            self.rst = True\r\n\r\n    def is_closed(self) -> bool:\r\n        return self.rst or (self.fin_c2s and self.fin_s2c)\r\n\r\n    def duration_sec(self) -> float:\r\n        return self.end_ts - self.start_ts if self.start_ts else 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_ip_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> str:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[0]\r\n    return a[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_port_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> int:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[1]\r\n    return a[1]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _client_syn_ts(segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp of first c2s segment (client SYN or first data). Used for RTT.\"\"\"\r\n    for ts, _payload, direction, _seq in segments:\r\n        if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n            return ts\r\n    return None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FlowTracker:\r\n    \"\"\"Tracks active flows; yields Flow and segments when a flow closes or times out.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        capture_file_id: str,\r\n        flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = 60.0,\r\n        concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = 1.0,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        self.capture_file_id = capture_file_id\r\n        self.flow_idle_timeout_sec = flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        self.concurrency_bucket_seconds = concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._flows: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], _FlowState] = {}\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets: defaultdict[float, set[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]]] = (\r\n            defaultdict(set)\r\n        )\r\n        self._current_ts: float = 0.0\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_flow(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]) -> _FlowState:\r\n        if key not in self._flows:\r\n            self._flows[key] = _FlowState(key=key)\r\n        return self._flows[key]\r\n\r\n    def _update_concurrency(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], ts: float) -> None:\r\n        bucket = (ts // self.concurrency_bucket_seconds) * self.concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets[bucket].add(key)\r\n\r\n    def _get_concurrency_timeline(self) -> list[tuple[float, int]]:\r\n        return [(t, len(s)) for t, s in sorted(self._concurrency_buckets.items())]\r\n\r\n    def _build_flow_model(\r\n        self,\r\n        state: _FlowState,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None,\r\n    ) -> Flow:\r\n        duration = state.duration_sec()\r\n        rtt_ms = None\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts is not None and state.client_syn_ts is not None:\r\n            rtt_ms = (state.syn_ack_ts - state.client_syn_ts) * 1000.0\r\n        return Flow(\r\n            flow_id=flow_id,\r\n            capture_file_id=self.capture_file_id,\r\n            src_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            src_port=state.client_port,\r\n            dst_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            dst_port=state.server_port,\r\n            protocol=6,\r\n            client_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            client_port=state.client_port,\r\n            server_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            server_port=state.server_port,\r\n            start_ts=state.start_ts,\r\n            end_ts=state.end_ts,\r\n            duration_sec=duration,\r\n            bytes_client_to_server=state.bytes_c2s,\r\n            bytes_server_to_client=state.bytes_s2c,\r\n            packet_count_c2s=state.packets_c2s,\r\n            packet_count_s2c=state.packets_s2c,\r\n            estimated_rtt_ms=rtt_ms,\r\n            concurrency_timeline=concurrency_timeline,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def ingest(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        protocol: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        tcp_flags: int,\r\n    ) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Process one packet. Yields (Flow, segments) for each flow that just closed.\"\"\"\r\n        self._current_ts = ts\r\n        key = _normalize_key(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n        state = self._ensure_flow(key)\r\n\r\n        state.add_packet(ts, src_ip, src_port, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n        self._update_concurrency(key, ts)\r\n\r\n        if state.is_closed():\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, protocol, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            timeline = self._get_concurrency_timeline()\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, timeline)\r\n            segments = state.segments\r\n            del self._flows[key]\r\n            yield (flow, segments)\r\n\r\n    def flush_idle(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Close flows that have been idle past flow_idle_timeout_sec. Yields (Flow, segments).\"\"\"\r\n        to_remove = [\r\n            k\r\n            for k, s in self._flows.items()\r\n            if self._current_ts - s.last_ts >= self.flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        ]\r\n        for key in to_remove:\r\n            state = self._flows.pop(key)\r\n            if not state.initiator_seen:\r\n                continue\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, 6, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, self._get_concurrency_timeline())\r\n            yield (flow, state.segments)\r\n            del state\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "890df5ea19fdb82b3e996ea9cecfc98eefc2a00a92e40a4e755abf486e59e4e5", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"TCP stream reassembly with out-of-order and retransmission handling; bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\n# TCP sequence numbers are 32-bit and wrap; we use unsigned 32-bit arithmetic\r\nSEQ_MASK = 0xFFFFFFFF\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_lt(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    \"\"\"True if a is strictly before b in sequence space (within 2^31 window).\"\"\"\r\n    if a == b:\r\n        return False\r\n    return (a - b) & SEQ_MASK < 0x80000000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_le(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    return a == b or _seq_lt(a, b)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _DirState:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassembly state for one direction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    next_seq: int | None = None  # next expected sequence number\r\n    emitted: bytearray = field(default_factory=bytearray)  # in-order bytes emitted so far\r\n    emitted_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]] = field(default_factory=list)  # (offset, ts) for first byte of segment\r\n    pending: list[tuple[int, bytes, float]] = field(default_factory=list)  # (seq, data, ts) not yet emitted\r\n    total_buffered: int = 0\r\n    max_bytes: int = 1 << 20  # 1 MB default\r\n    truncated: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def add_segment(self, seq: int, data: bytes, ts: float) -> None:\r\n        if self.truncated or not data:\r\n            return\r\n        if self.total_buffered + len(data) > self.max_bytes:\r\n            self.truncated = True\r\n            return\r\n        self.pending.append((seq, data, ts))\r\n        self.total_buffered += len(data)\r\n\r\n    def _ts_at_offset(self, offset: int) -> float | None:\r\n        \"\"\"Return approximate timestamp for byte at offset (from emitted_ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            return None\r\n        best_ts = None\r\n        for o, t in self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            if o <= offset:\r\n                best_ts = t\r\n        return best_ts\r\n\r\n    def get_reassembled(self) -> tuple[bytes, list[tuple[int, float]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Merge pending into emitted in order; return (full_bytes, ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.pending:\r\n            return (bytes(self.emitted), list(self.emitted_ts_map))\r\n        self.pending.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0] & SEQ_MASK, x[0]))\r\n        out = bytearray(self.emitted)\r\n        ts_map = list(self.emitted_ts_map)\r\n        next_seq = self.next_seq\r\n        if next_seq is None and self.pending:\r\n            next_seq = self.pending[0][0]\r\n        i = 0\r\n        while i < len(self.pending):\r\n            seq, data, _ts = self.pending[i]\r\n            if next_seq is None:\r\n                next_seq = seq\r\n            start_out_len = len(out)\r\n            # segment [seq, seq+len)\r\n            end_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            # Entire segment is before next_seq (duplicate/retrans) -> skip\r\n            if _seq_lt(end_seq, next_seq) or (end_seq == next_seq and _seq_lt(seq, next_seq)):\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            if _seq_lt(next_seq, seq):\r\n                # Gap: segment starts after next_seq\r\n                out.extend(data)\r\n                ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n                next_seq = end_seq\r\n                self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n                del self.pending[i]\r\n                continue\r\n            # Overlap: segment overlaps next_seq\r\n            offset = (next_seq - seq) & SEQ_MASK\r\n            if offset >= len(data):\r\n                # Segment entirely before next_seq (duplicate)\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            chunk = data[offset:]\r\n            out.extend(chunk)\r\n            ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n            next_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n            del self.pending[i]\r\n        self.emitted = out\r\n        self.next_seq = next_seq\r\n        self.emitted_ts_map = ts_map\r\n        return (bytes(out), ts_map)\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TCPReassembler:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassemble TCP streams per flow with bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(self, max_bytes_per_direction: int = 1 << 20) -> None:\r\n        self.max_bytes_per_direction = max_bytes_per_direction\r\n\r\n    def reassemble(\r\n        self,\r\n        segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]],\r\n    ) -> tuple[bytes, bytes, list[tuple[int, float]], list[tuple[int, float]], bool]:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Reassemble segments into client-to-server and server-to-client byte streams.\r\n        Returns (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated).\r\n        ts_map: list of (byte_offset, timestamp) for first byte of each segment.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        c2s = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        s2c = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        for ts, payload, direction, seq in segments:\r\n            if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n                c2s.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n            else:\r\n                s2c.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n        c2s_bytes, c2s_ts_map = c2s.get_reassembled()\r\n        s2c_bytes, s2c_ts_map = s2c.get_reassembled()\r\n        truncated = c2s.truncated or s2c.truncated\r\n        return (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "1f8ea431db6311751379111ad31922255faa7d34e32ef3bcfdaf9e43bd55d74a", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "2ae6e8e0e1b302ccb7fad7df934e3cf225e40699955c9d3ced87496000f26f32", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(server_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"}, "2:LEN":
